title: sedum telephium var. rupifragum
intro: Sedum telephium var. rupifragum, also known as Dragon's Blood, is a variety of sedum that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is a succulent plant known for its red to purple flowers and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. Sedum telephium var. rupifragum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable plant for herbal remedies.
